description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical plant pot with a smooth, matte brown exterior and a flat, dark top surface that likely represents soil or a cover. The pot features subtle vertical ridges along its sides, giving it a slightly faceted appearance. On two opposite sides, there are clusters of white, jagged elements that resemble decorative stones or artificial filler, partially protruding from the pot's body. The overall design is simple and modern, with no visible handles or ornate patterns. The pot appears sturdy and is likely made from ceramic or a composite material. Its proportions suggest it is suitable for small to medium plants and would fit well in urban outdoor or semi-outdoor settings.
description: A medium, cylindrical brown plant pot with a dark top and white decorative stones on two sides. The surface is smooth and modern, suitable for small to medium plants.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cylindrical brown pot with a dark top and white stones protruding from both left and right sides.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the left-side cluster of white stones and the smooth, faceted brown surface.
description_view_2: The right-side cluster of white stones is more visible, with the dark top and brown body clearly shown.
description_view_3: Back view emphasizes the left-side stones and the uninterrupted brown surface, with minimal features on the right.
attribute_placement_context: commonly placed along sidewalks or in urban parks for decorative planting
